angle: A cleaner cancels mid-workday and the next guest checks in at three. Hububb dispatches the next vetted local cleaner and runs the whole turnover.
brief: Marketer static batch, concept 2 of 8 (HUB_JUL_MAR_CLEANERCXL), problem to fix, lifestyle take. Pillar: runs-itself, funnel: convert. Audience: side-hustle host stuck at a desk job, London. Spotlight: the real vetted-cleaner photo full bleed under the scrim, two-tone headline carrying the pain, CTA pill and proof chip. Paid-ad candidate.

copy.headline: Your cleaner bailed at 9.
copy.subhead: Hububb dispatches the next vetted local cleaner and the flat is ready before they arrive.
copy.proof: A built-in network of vetted local cleaners.

social.primaryText:
Your cleaner cancels. You are at your desk, back-to-back in meetings, and the next guest checks in at three.

Hububb has it handled: a built-in network of vetted local cleaners, dispatched the moment your last guest checks out. No 9 a.m. group chat about who has the keys. No drive across town.

Start with one listing and move more over when it's earning.
